level_signals: Liaison between sales leadership and executive teams
Experience creating board level presentation decks
Mentors teams and drives accountability in high-growth environments

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years in a similar role contributing to sales operations, business development and strategy, preferably in AI, SaaS, or enterprise software.
Strong analytical mindset, proficiency in CRM platforms (e.g., Salesforce), and expertise in sales process optimization.
Ability to mentor teams, drive accountability, and navigate high-growth environments.
Experience translating business goals into actionable sales plans.
Executive level communication skills & experience creating board level presentation decks & customer engagement materials.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 10+ years in a similar role contributing to sales operations, business development and strategy, preferably in AI, SaaS, or enterprise software.

scope.surface: Sales operations, business development, and cross-functional go-to-market alignment
core_responsibilities: Partner with the CRO to define and implement sales strategies, forecasts, and performance metrics
Streamline sales processes, including pipeline management, CRM optimization, and sales enablement tools
Work closely with marketing, product, and customer success teams to ensure cohesive go-to-market execution
Monitor sales KPIs, conduct data-driven insights, and recommend adjustments to improve conversion rates and revenue attainment
Contribute to sales operations, business development, and support functions, fostering a high-performance culture
Serve as a liaison between sales leadership and executive teams, ensuring clear communication and strategic alignment

green_flags: Direct partnership with CRO — high visibility and influence
Encourages applicants who don't meet every qualification
Generous benefits including 6 weeks vacation, full health/dental, 100% parental leave top-up
Remote-flexible policy with multiple global office options
Cohere is a well-known frontier AI company with a clear mission
red_flags: Role title is 'Chief of Staff' but responsibilities are narrowly focused on sales operations — scope may be narrower than a traditional CoS role
10+ years requirement is firm and the role is senior; limited flexibility indicated despite 'encourage you to apply' language

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 10+ years, CRO partnership, board-level deck experience)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description and enterprise software context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not explicitly stated)
location.remote_us_eligible (inferred from 'remote-flexible' language and US office locations)
ambiguities: Role title is 'Chief of Staff' but the JD description is almost entirely focused on sales operations and revenue — this could be better described as VP/Head of Sales Operations. Archetype set to 'Chief of Staff' per JD title but flagged here.
Location is described as 'remote-flexible' with offices in multiple cities; it is unclear whether candidates must be based near an office or can be fully remote.
Work authorization and visa sponsorship are not mentioned anywhere in the JD.
